news.t: Invesco QQQ Innovation Suite adds Invesco Top QQQ ETF (QBIG) and Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF (QQLV)

holdings.infoBox: QQLV is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Linde stock at 5.07%, American Electric Power Company at 4.91%, Monster Beverage at 4.68%, Exelon at 4.61%, and Xcel Energy at 4.55%.

overview.description: The Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF (QQLV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq-100 Low Volatility index. The fund tracks an index of the lowest volatility stocks from the Nasdaq-100. QQLV was launched on Dec 4, 2024 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco QQQ Innovation Suite adds Invesco Top QQQ ETF (QBIG) and Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF (QQLV)
data.text: New offerings position Invesco as the provider with the most expansive set of ETF assets that access unique exposures of the groundbreaking companies within Nasdaq Indexes ATLANTA , Dec. 4, 2024 /PRNe...
